series_metadata.series_description: All informal communications which convey information of temporary importance in lieu of oral communication including telephone voicemail, chats, posts, instant, and text-messages, post-it notes, drafts, generic emails, social media posts, and shared departmental calendars. These communications have very little administrative value as they do not set policy, establish guidelines, define procedures, certify a transaction, or become a receipt.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value, and then destroy. Similar to General Schedule: GAR-CM-04 ; Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value, and then destroy. Similar to General Schedule: GAR-CM-04, Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Wastepaper
